Who I Am

About Me

Hi, I'm V. Monisha 👋

I'm a First-Year B.Sc. Information Technology student at RD National College of Arts & Science, Erode — driven by curiosity, creativity, and an unstoppable passion for technology.

In my very first year, I earned the Most Promising Developer medal and a heartfelt personal recognition letter from the College Chairman — proof that passion and dedication speak louder than experience.

My dream is to become a Software Engineer at Google and build technology that changes the world. Every project, every line of code, every late-night study session — it's all part of the journey.

🎓 B.Sc. IT 🤖 AI Enthusiast 💻 Developer 🎨 UI/UX 🌐 Web Dev 🏅 Award Winner ✨ Google Dreamer 🎭 Creative

My First Victory

Achievement

🏅 Most Promising Developer

RD National College of Arts & Science, Erode

 First Year Achievement · 2024

📜 Chairman's Recognition Letter

Personal letter from the Chairman, RD National College, Erode

"Every expert was once a beginner. This is the first step toward my Google dream — and every great journey begins with a single, courageous step."

  • Awarded the Most Promising Developer bronze medal in my very first year — a hexagonal trophy recognising exceptional programming potential and dedication among all B.Sc. IT students.
  • Received a personal Chairman's letter from RD National College stating: "Your dedication, friendliness, and genuine interest in technology highlight your commitment to improving step by step."
  • The Chairman personally wrote: "Your attitude and determination will help you achieve great success in both your academic journey and professional life."
  • This medal and letter are my launchpad — I am firmly on my path to becoming a Software Engineer at Google. This is just the beginning.
  • I believe: start with passion, stay consistent, and no goal is too big — not even Google. 💜

Student Management System
